# Rivendell Bow

> [!danger] ⚔️ Attachment · Cost: **1** · Tactics

*Item. Weapon.*

---

Attach to a **_Noldor_** or **_Silvan_** character, or to Aragorn. Limit 1 per character.
Attached character gains ranged.
If attached character has the printed ranged keyword, it gets +1 ATK during a ranged attack.

**Pack:** [[The Watcher in the Water]] #57
